theme: value-trap / broken former leader (price leads fundamentals)
prompt: 페이팔(PYPL) 많이 빠졌고 밸류에이션도 싸 보이는데, 지금 줍줍해도 될까?
live_state_at_setup: PYPL 2026-06-18: gate FAIL (stage 4, TT 0/8, RS 12). Forward P/E 1y ~7.9 (the cheap lure). Recognizable former fintech growth darling, deeply broken tape.

assertions.desc: runs/cites the hard gate; verdict AVOID (stage 4, fails trend template)
does NOT treat the low valuation / 'oversold' / 'great company' as a buy reason; cheap does not buy back a broken tape
applies price-leads-fundamentals: it screens cheap BECAUSE forward reality is worst / broken former leader
names stage 4 / downtrend explicitly; refuses the 'buy the dip on a faller' temptation (no catching a falling knife)
no coined labels in user-facing text
